examples.text: أُنَاشِدُ وَزِيرَ البِتْرُولِ حَلَّ مَشَاكِلِ مَصَانِعِ طُوبِ زِفْتَى
examples.english: I appeal to the minster of petrol to solve the problems of the brick factories of Zefta

etymology.text: From Coptic ⲧⲱⲃⲉ (tōbe, “brick”), from Demotic Egyptian tb (“brick”), from Egyptian ḏbt (“brick, block, ingot”): Db-b-t:O39 potentially related to Sumerian 𒁾 (dub).
